# DISCONTINUED

**📖 ThreeCore:**

ThreeCore is the foundation for ThreeTAG Mods on 1.16. It includes code for superpowers, size changing and much more, and provides compatibility between the mods. It also comes with the ability to make addonpacks!

![](https://i.imgur.com/oGsQGqM.png)

**💿 Mods:**

*   [PymTech](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pymtech)

![](https://i.imgur.com/oGsQGqM.png)

**📘 Addon Packs:**

Addonpacks allow you to add custom items, suits, and even superpowers to the game just via json (and JavaScript)! To get started follow this [wiki](https://gitlab.com/threetag/latest/threecore/-/wikis/home).

 

![](https://i.imgur.com/oGsQGqM.png)

[![](https://scalacube.com/images/banners/modpack.jpg)](https://scalacube.com/p/_hosting_server_minecraft/2228579)
